text:
We observe that Tables 13.1 and 13.3
are using the same data and employing the
formula for the calculation of the mean
but the results obtained a
same
are different.
Can you think why t
this is so, and which one is more accurate? The difference in the
two values is because of the mid-point assumption in Table 13.3, 59.3 being the exact
mean, while 62
an a
approximate mean.
